{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Supply Chain / Logistics Officer",
  "description": "Phillips Outsourcing Limited has been in existence for over 16 years. We have a vast experience in the outsourcing business as we currently manage resources for major clients in all sectors of the Nigerian economy. In addition, our prolific manpower cuts across the 36 states in Nigeria. After successfully gaining ground in all the 36 states of the federation, we are gradually spreading our tentacles to other African Nations. We are currently registered to also do business in Ghana. Our framework is developed to fully support the businesses of our clients, ensuring continuous improvement of the outsourced services. This ultimately thrusts our clients to achieve their business objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supply Chain / Logistics Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos

Responsibilities


	Planning and managing transportation, shipping schedules, and distribution routes to maximize efficiency.
	Overseeing inventory levels, conducting stock checks, and managing warehouse operations to prevent shortages or excess holding costs.
	Negotiating with suppliers and vendors for favorable terms, processing orders, and ensuring high-quality products.
	Preparing shipping documents, managing invoices, and ensuring compliance with company policies and legal regulations.
	Using software to track goods and analyzing data to identify opportunities for reducing costs and improving operations.


Requirements


	B.Sc./HND in a related field.
	Proficiency in MS Office (especially Excel) and inventory management software.
	Understanding of transportation modes, warehousing, and supply chain processes.
	Strong negotiation, analytical, organizational, and communication skills.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 Monthly",

Supply Chain / Logistics Officer Job at Phillips Outsourcing Limited




        
    

        
        Phillips Outsourcing Limited has been in existence for over 16 years. We have a vast experience in the outsourcing business as we currently manage resources for major clients in all sectors of the Nigerian economy. In addition, our prolific manpower cuts across the 36 states in Nigeria. After successfully gaining ground in all the 36 states of the federation, we are gradually spreading our tentacles to other African Nations. We are currently registered to also do business in Ghana. Our framework is developed to fully support the businesses of our clients, ensuring continuous improvement of the outsourced services. This ultimately thrusts our clients to achieve their business objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Supply Chain / Logistics Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos

Responsibilities


	Planning and managing transportation, shipping schedules, and distribution routes to maximize efficiency.
	Overseeing inventory levels, conducting stock checks, and managing warehouse operations to prevent shortages or excess holding costs.
	Negotiating with suppliers and vendors for favorable terms, processing orders, and ensuring high-quality products.
	Preparing shipping documents, managing invoices, and ensuring compliance with company policies and legal regulations.
	Using software to track goods and analyzing data to identify opportunities for reducing costs and improving operations.


Requirements


	B.Sc./HND in a related field.
	Proficiency in MS Office (especially Excel) and inventory management software.
	Understanding of transportation modes, warehousing, and supply chain processes.
	Strong negotiation, analytical, organizational, and communication skills.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 Monthly    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

title: Job Openings at Equinoxx Power Engineering Limited
content:
Equinoxx Power Engineering Limited - Perkins Generator, FG wilson UK, Power Transformer has given Equinoxx Power Engineering as an engineering support and sales company which specialty in Engineering Services, Sales & Servicing of Generators,Heavy duty equipment,Power systems, Inverter, Transformers sales and installations, Safety, Cooling and Air conditional & Industrial Equipment, and General Contract.

We are recruiting to fill the follwoing positions below:

1.) Creative Director

Job Location: Lagos
Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We're seeking a visionary Creative Director to lead our creative team, drive brand storytelling, and deliver innovative campaigns.


Responsibilities


	Develop and execute creative strategies
	Lead and mentor a team of creatives
	Collaborate with clients and stakeholders
	Oversee campaign production and delivery
	Stay ahead of industry trends.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an OND / HND / B.Sc Degree with at least 1 year experience.


Benefits


	Competitive salary (N200,000 - N300,000 monthly) and benefits
	Opportunities for growth and professional development
	Dynamic work environment with a talented team.


Application Closing Date: 10th April, 2026.

Method of Aplication 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Marketing Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We're seeking a creative and driven Marketing Officer to develop and implement marketing strategies, manage campaigns, and drive brand awareness for our growing business.


Responsibilities
Marketing Strategy:


	Develop and execute marketing plans to achieve business goals
	Identify target audience, market trends, and competitor analysis


Campaign Management:


	Create and execute campaigns across digital, social, and traditional channels
	Manage budgets, timelines, and campaign performance


Brand Development:


	Support brand positioning and messaging consistency
	Collaborate with teams on brand identity and promotions


Content and Social Media:


	Create engaging content for social media and marketing channels
	Manage social media presence and community engagement


Analysis and Reporting:


	Track campaign performance and ROI
	Provide insights and recommendations for improving.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Salary
N150,000 - N300,000 / month

Application Closing Date: 1st April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

3.) Production Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We're seeking an experienced Production Manager to oversee our production process, ensuring efficient and high-quality output. You'll lead a team, plan and coordinate production schedules, and implement process improvements.


Responsibilities


	Manage production team and provide guidance
	Plan and schedule production to meet deadlines
	Monitor production processes and implement improvements
	Ensure quality control and troubleshoot issues
	Collaborate with procurement and inventory management
	Analyze production data and optimize processes


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree in Production Management or related field
	3-5 years of production management experience
	Strong leadership and communication skills
	Proficient in production planning and inventory management software
	Analytical and problem-solving skills.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits
	Opportunities for growth and professional development
	Dynamic work environment with a talented team.


Application Closing Date: 31st March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "AI-Native Full Stack Developer",
  "description": "Visa Application Consulting, (VAC) is a global information and technology company, which offers one-stop-shop travel visa services to Nigerians. VAC provides processing of very personal information, in a very secure manner through our proprietary Visa Help Center Platform. Our service offerings serve mid- to high-end Nigerian travelers and include a wide range of offerings from personal in their office service, to online form-filling &ndash; focused around obtaining travel visas to multiple destinations. If we don&rsquo;t provide it, we will help our clients find it.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: AI-Native Full Stack Developer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	We are looking for an AI-Native Full Stack Developer who is passionate about building intelligent, scalable, and user-centric applications powered by AI.
	This role is for someone who doesn&rsquo;t just &ldquo;use AI tools&rdquo;, but thinks AI-first, integrates AI deeply into product architecture, and can ship fast, production-ready systems.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, build, and deploy full-stack applications with AI at the core
	Integrate LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, etc.) into real-world workflows
	Develop scalable backend systems and APIs
	Build responsive and intuitive frontend interfaces
	Implement prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, and AI automation systems
	Collaborate with product, design, and business teams to ship features quickly
	Optimize performance, security, and scalability of applications


Required Skills &amp; Experience


	Strong experience in JavaScript/TypeScript
	Proficiency in React / Next.js (Frontend)
	Backend experience with Node.js / Python (FastAPI, Django, etc.)
	Hands-on experience with AI/LLM integrations (OpenAI API, LangChain, etc.)
	Solid understanding of databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
	Experience building and deploying cloud-based applications (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
	Familiarity with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)
	Strong problem-solving and system design skills


What We&rsquo;re Looking For:


	Someone who moves fast and ships consistently
	A builder who is curious, experimental, and adaptable
	Strong ownership mindset, you take ideas from concept to production
	Passion for leveraging AI to solve real-world problems.


Nice to Have:


	Experience with AI agents and automation workflows
	Knowledge of RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems
	DevOps experience (Docker, CI/CD pipelines)
	Startup or fast-paced product experience


Compensation &amp; Benefits


	Competitive salary (based on experience);&nbsp;N300,000 - N400,000 per month.
	Remote-friendly work environment
	Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI products
	Growth opportunities within a fast-scaling team.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;agent@vappconsulting.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

AI-Native Full Stack Developer Job at Visa Application Consulting




        
    

        
        Visa Application Consulting, (VAC) is a global information and technology company, which offers one-stop-shop travel visa services to Nigerians. VAC provides processing of very personal information, in a very secure manner through our proprietary Visa Help Center Platform. Our service offerings serve mid- to high-end Nigerian travelers and include a wide range of offerings from personal in their office service, to online form-filling – focused around obtaining travel visas to multiple destinations. If we don’t provide it, we will help our clients find it.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: AI-Native Full Stack Developer

Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary 


	We are looking for an AI-Native Full Stack Developer who is passionate about building intelligent, scalable, and user-centric applications powered by AI.
	This role is for someone who doesn’t just “use AI tools”, but thinks AI-first, integrates AI deeply into product architecture, and can ship fast, production-ready systems.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, build, and deploy full-stack applications with AI at the core
	Integrate LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, etc.) into real-world workflows
	Develop scalable backend systems and APIs
	Build responsive and intuitive frontend interfaces
	Implement prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, and AI automation systems
	Collaborate with product, design, and business teams to ship features quickly
	Optimize performance, security, and scalability of applications


Required Skills & Experience


	Strong experience in JavaScript/TypeScript
	Proficiency in React / Next.js (Frontend)
	Backend experience with Node.js / Python (FastAPI, Django, etc.)
	Hands-on experience with AI/LLM integrations (OpenAI API, LangChain, etc.)
	Solid understanding of databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
	Experience building and deploying cloud-based applications (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
	Familiarity with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)
	Strong problem-solving and system design skills


What We’re Looking For:


	Someone who moves fast and ships consistently
	A builder who is curious, experimental, and adaptable
	Strong ownership mindset, you take ideas from concept to production
	Passion for leveraging AI to solve real-world problems.


Nice to Have:


	Experience with AI agents and automation workflows
	Knowledge of RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems
	DevOps experience (Docker, CI/CD pipelines)
	Startup or fast-paced product experience


Compensation & Benefits


	Competitive salary (based on experience); N300,000 - N400,000 per month.
	Remote-friendly work environment
	Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI products
	Growth opportunities within a fast-scaling team.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Office Secretary",
  "description": "Mainland Haulage Services Limited, a haulage and automotive company in Abuja.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Secretary

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)

Job Description


	Answer telephone calls and respond to inquiries via mails.
	Perform administrative tasks, including filing, Scanning and photocopying of necessary document.
	Receive all documents and items sent to the office from sub-offices and partners.
	Maintain and ensure office supplies.
	Maintain optimum confidentiality about office files/record.
	Follow up mails and items sent from the company and confirm they are being received by the target receiver.
	Schedule meeting between the management and partners/clients.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 2 - 5 years of work experience.
	Good knowledge of Computer on MS-words, Excel, power point.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;mainlandhaulage@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

        Mainland Haulage Services Limited, a haulage and automotive company in Abuja.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

	Answer telephone calls and respond to inquiries via mails.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Control Officer",
  "description": "Amo Farm Sieberer Hatchery Limited has a Vision to be the market leader in the Day Old Chicks market; through exceptional quality products and services that will guarantee profitable poultry farming.&nbsp;The Company produces high-quality Day-Old Chicks and Point of Cage Pullets. Over the years, we have remained focused on our main objective to produce high quality chicks, in a highly hygienic environment leveraging innovative solutions grounded in Research and Development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;&nbsp;Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose


	Develop and implement internal control policies and procedures in accordance with relevant laws and regulations.
	Monitor and investigate suspicious activities or transactions to prevent fraud, embezzlement, or other financial crimes.
	Collaborate with management to develop and implement corrective actions to address identified control deficiencies or non-compliance issues.


Roles and Responsibilities


	Ensure the correctness and accuracy of every record of the company through daily call-over reports
	Ensure that all credit sales are duly approved
	Ensure a well-controlled payable portfolio
	Early detection/correction of shortage/suppression
	Ensure strict adherence to the budget as approved by management for the company
	Ensure that I.O.U collected are duly approved and retired within 48hrs/completion of the assignment
	Ensure strict compliance with company processes, procedures and regulations
	Ensure safeguarding the various assets of the company e, e.g., consumables, stock, fixed assets, etc.
	Monitoring of diesel intake from vendors and internal dispensing to ensure accuracy and prevent conversion, pilferage, theft or fraud
	Ensure adherence to the HSE regulations
	Prevention and detection of fraud, forgery, and operational errors
	Prepare and submit regular reports to ICM/HIC and other RELEVANT stakeholders on the status of internal control activities, including any issues or concerns that require attention.
	Any other duty that may be assigned from time to time.


Requirements


	Education Qualification: BSc / HND in Accounting
	Required Years of Experience: 2-3 years of relevant experience in internal control, auditing, compliance, risk management, or accounting at officer level
	Professional Certification: ICAN ATS Certification


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Ability to manage multiple responsibilities to completion with tight timelines
	Business planning and analysis
	Strong communication (verbal and written) skills
	People and time management
	Report writing and presentation
	Protection of Confidential Information
	MS Office Tools and Calendar Management
	Good negotiation skills.
	Knowledge of poultry business operations and experience with process improvement
	Excellent relationship management skills
	Problem-solving ability
	Lateral thinking skills.


Expected Behavioral Competencies:


	Resourcefulness in handling challenges.
	Dependability in fulfilling responsibilities.
	Passion for maintaining high standards of control and compliance.
	Integrity in all dealings.
	Promptness in addressing issues.
	Accountability for actions and decisions.
	Representing the company&#39;s image and brand positively.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;vacancies@afshltd.com&nbsp;with the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Internal Control Officer Job at Amo Farm Sieberer Hatchery Limited




        
    

        
        Amo Farm Sieberer Hatchery Limited has a Vision to be the market leader in the Day Old Chicks market; through exceptional quality products and services that will guarantee profitable poultry farming. The Company produces high-quality Day-Old Chicks and Point of Cage Pullets. Over the years, we have remained focused on our main objective to produce high quality chicks, in a highly hygienic environment leveraging innovative solutions grounded in Research and Development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control Officer

Job Location:  Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and implement internal control policies and procedures in accordance with relevant laws and regulations.
	Monitor and investigate suspicious activities or transactions to prevent fraud, embezzlement, or other financial crimes.
	Collaborate with management to develop and implement corrective actions to address identified control deficiencies or non-compliance issues.


Roles and Responsibilities


	Ensure the correctness and accuracy of every record of the company through daily call-over reports
	Ensure that all credit sales are duly approved
	Ensure a well-controlled payable portfolio
	Early detection/correction of shortage/suppression
	Ensure strict adherence to the budget as approved by management for the company
	Ensure that I.O.U collected are duly approved and retired within 48hrs/completion of the assignment
	Ensure strict compliance with company processes, procedures and regulations
	Ensure safeguarding the various assets of the company e, e.g., consumables, stock, fixed assets, etc.
	Monitoring of diesel intake from vendors and internal dispensing to ensure accuracy and prevent conversion, pilferage, theft or fraud
	Ensure adherence to the HSE regulations
	Prevention and detection of fraud, forgery, and operational errors
	Prepare and submit regular reports to ICM/HIC and other RELEVANT stakeholders on the status of internal control activities, including any issues or concerns that require attention.
	Any other duty that may be assigned from time to time.


Requirements


	Education Qualification: BSc / HND in Accounting
	Required Years of Experience: 2-3 years of relevant experience in internal control, auditing, compliance, risk management, or accounting at officer level
	Professional Certification: ICAN ATS Certification


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Ability to manage multiple responsibilities to completion with tight timelines
	Business planning and analysis
	Strong communication (verbal and written) skills
	People and time management
	Report writing and presentation
	Protection of Confidential Information
	MS Office Tools and Calendar Management
	Good negotiation skills.
	Knowledge of poultry business operations and experience with process improvement
	Excellent relationship management skills
	Problem-solving ability
	Lateral thinking skills.


Expected Behavioral Competencies:


	Resourcefulness in handling challenges.
	Dependability in fulfilling responsibilities.
	Passion for maintaining high standards of control and compliance.
	Integrity in all dealings.
	Promptness in addressing issues.
	Accountability for actions and decisions.
	Representing the company's image and brand positively.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] with the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
